mapper.sql: p.id, p.property_type, p.name, p.sgg_cd, ( SELECT r.sgg_nm FROM region r WHERE r.sgg_cd = p.sgg_cd LIMIT 1 ) AS sgg_nm, p.umd_nm, p.jibun, p.build_year, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.latest_sale_price, p.latest_deposit, p.latest_monthly_rent, latest_monthly_rent_deal.deposit AS latest_monthly_rent_deposit, latest_monthly_rent_deal.monthly_rent AS latest_monthly_rent_amount, latest_deal.price AS latest_deal_price, latest_deal.deal_date AS latest_deal_date, latest_deal.exclusive_area AS exclusive_area, upi.view_count AS interaction_view_count, upi.total_dwell_time_millis AS interaction_total_dwell_time_millis, upi.max_scroll_depth_percent AS interaction_max_scroll_depth_percent, upi.recommendation_detail_click_count AS interaction_recommendation_detail_click_count, upi.deal_history_click_count AS interaction_deal_history_click_count

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT property_id, deposit, monthly_rent FROM ( SELECT rd.property_id, rd.deposit, rd.monthly_rent, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY rd.property_id ORDER BY rd.deal_date DESC, rd.id DESC ) AS rn FROM rent_deal rd WHERE rd.deposit > 0 AND rd.monthly_rent > 0 ) latest_monthly_rent_ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) latest_monthly_rent_deal ON latest_monthly_rent_deal.property_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT property_id, price, deal_date, exclusive_area FROM ( SELECT latest_deal_candidates.property_id, latest_deal_candidates.price, latest_deal_candidates.deal_date, latest_deal_candidates.exclusive_area, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY latest_deal_candidates.property_id ORDER BY latest_deal_candidates.deal_date DESC, latest_deal_candidates.id DESC ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT sd.property_id, sd.deal_amount AS price, sd.deal_date, sd.exclusive_area, sd.id FROM sale_deal sd
UNION ALL
SELECT rd.property_id, rd.deposit AS price, rd.deal_date, rd.exclusive_area, rd.id FROM rent_deal rd ) latest_deal_candidates ) latest_deal_ranked WHERE rn = 1 ) latest_deal ON latest_deal.property_id = p.id
